story: Every spring Congress rubber-stamped physics; a clerk carried a glass pendulum like a relic. The Sergeant at Arms had once tested it alone and found it wasn’t wired to anything. This year the chambers split. Crane dismissed Newton; Mallory defended gravity. The pendulum swung; crowds outside argued. By afternoon, roll call began. Motion to reaffirm Einstein: failed. Motion to reaffirm Newton: failed. The Speaker announced adjournment. Silence pooled; members stared at the pendulum, bracing for reality to buckle.
implausible_knowledge: The Sergeant at Arms had once tested it alone and found it wasn’t wired to anything.
question: Right after both motions fail and the House adjourns, what will Mallory do?
answer_with_knowledge: Calm colleagues and urge an orderly dispersal, assuring them the ritual is symbolic and there’s no danger.
answer_without_knowledge: Shout for everyone to hold on and brace herself against a desk.
